title: Listening - Part 1
description: You will hear three different extracts. For questions 1–6, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best.
instructions: You will hear three different extracts. For questions 1–6, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear. There are two questions for each extract.

extracts.context: You hear two friends talking about a new plant-based restaurant.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: I finally went to 'The Green Leaf' last night. The cashew-nut cheese was surprisingly convincing! || Man: [1]I found the menu a bit limited, to be honest[/1]. If you don't like mushrooms, you’re basically left with a salad. || Woman: I see your point, but [2]I was really impressed by how knowledgeable the servers were about cross-contamination[/2]. They could tell me exactly where every ingredient was sourced. || Man: I agree, the service was top-notch. Though I wish the room wasn't so echoes. It was hard to hear you across the table. || Woman: It’s that minimalist 'industrial' look. It looks great, but it’s terrible for a quiet conversation.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I finally went to 'The Green Leaf' last night. The cashew-nut cheese was surprisingly convincing!

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I found the menu a bit limited, to be honest. If you don't like mushrooms, you’re basically left with a salad.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I see your point, but I was really impressed by how knowledgeable the servers were about cross-contamination. They could tell me exactly where every ingredient was sourced.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I agree, the service was top-notch. Though I wish the room wasn't so echoes. It was hard to hear you across the table.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: It’s that minimalist 'industrial' look. It looks great, but it’s terrible for a quiet conversation.

questions.question: What is the man's main criticism of the restaurant?

options.B: the lack of choice in the dishes
options.C: the high price of the meals

questions.explanation: He finds the menu 'a bit limited' and notes that mushroom-haters have few options [1].

questions.question: The woman liked the restaurant because

options.A: of the staff's expertise in food safety.
options.C: the atmosphere was conducive to talking.

questions.explanation: She was impressed by how the servers knew about 'cross-contamination' [2].

extracts.context: You hear two colleagues discussing a professional networking event they attended.
extracts.audio_script: Man: That 'Business-Mixer' was a bit of a whirlwind, wasn't it? I’ve run out of business cards. || Woman: [3]I suspect most people were only there to pitch their own services rather than actually listen to anyone else[/3]. || Man: It did feel a bit transactional. I didn't have a single conversation that wasn't a sales pitch. || Woman: [4]What really stood out to me was the poor choice of venue[/4]. Trying to network in a dark basement with loud music was just ridiculous. || Man: I agree. I spent most of the night shouting into people's ears and still didn't catch their names. || Woman: Exactly. If you want people to talk, you have to provide an environment where they actually can.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That 'Business-Mixer' was a bit of a whirlwind, wasn't it? I’ve run out of business cards.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I suspect most people were only there to pitch their own services rather than actually listen to anyone else.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: It did feel a bit transactional. I didn't have a single conversation that wasn't a sales pitch.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What really stood out to me was the poor choice of venue. Trying to network in a dark basement with loud music was just ridiculous.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I agree. I spent most of the night shouting into people's ears and still didn't catch their names.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Exactly. If you want people to talk, you have to provide an environment where they actually can.

questions.question: The woman suggests that the participants at the event were

options.A: not sufficiently experienced in their fields.
options.B: unwilling to engage in meaningful dialogue.
options.C: too focused on socializing rather than working.

questions.explanation: She thinks people were there to 'pitch' rather than 'listen to anyone else' [3].

questions.question: Both speakers agree that the event was

options.B: too long for the amount of content.

questions.explanation: They both criticize the 'poor choice of venue' and the loud music in the basement [4].

extracts.context: You hear two people discussing a new mobile game that uses augmented reality (AR).
extracts.audio_script: Man: I’ve been playing 'City-Quest' on my commute. It’s a great way to discover hidden history while you walk. || Woman: [5]I found the AR overlays a bit clunky and slow to load[/5], especially when the signal wasn't great. || Man: I had the same issue. It’s a bit frustrating when the 'ghost' you’re supposed to find doesn't appear for three minutes. || Woman: [6]I did appreciate the quality of the historical research, though[/6]. The facts they’ve included are genuinely obscure and interesting. || Man: I agree. It feels like a lot of care went into the writing, even if the tech isn't quite there yet. || Woman: It’s a nice concept. I just hope they optimize the performance in the next update.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I’ve been playing 'City-Quest' on my commute. It’s a great way to discover hidden history while you walk.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I found the AR overlays a bit clunky and slow to load, especially when the signal wasn't great.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I had the same issue. It’s a bit frustrating when the 'ghost' you’re supposed to find doesn't appear for three minutes.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I did appreciate the quality of the historical research, though. The facts they’ve included are genuinely obscure and interesting.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I agree. It feels like a lot of care went into the writing, even if the tech isn't quite there yet.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: It’s a nice concept. I just hope they optimize the performance in the next update.

questions.question: What was the woman's main issue with the game?

options.B: the technical performance of the software

questions.explanation: She found the AR overlays 'clunky and slow to load' [5].

questions.question: Both speakers were impressed by the game's
questions.explanation: They both praise the 'quality of the historical research' and the care in the 'writing' [6].
